_comment: Settings for the FinalWindow overlay shown at game end. Position offsets use the same coordinate conventions as game-settings.json: portrait/landscape pairs, aligned to Top or Bottom edge.

overlay._comment: Full-screen translucent black rectangle drawn in container local-space.

imgFin._comment: Win image. Aligned to Top; portraitY/landscapeY are offsets downward from the top edge.

intro._comment: Fade + zoom-in with bounces. Use Bounce.Out for multi-bounce feel.

pulse._comment: After intro: continuously grows and shrinks in a loop.

btnFin._comment: CTA button. Aligned to Bottom; portraitY/landscapeY are offsets upward (negative = up from bottom).

twitch._comment: Periodic grow-and-shrink twitch loop that starts after the intro.
